typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	ExecutionBatchID as integer (),
	ExternalFactoryCode as integer (),
	MaxUID as integer (),
	ProfilSSIS as string (),
	RMData as string (),
	pDestination as string (),
	pExtFactoryCode as integer (),
	pSource as string (),
	pStage as string ()
}

source(output(
		COFRML as string,
		COETAB as integer,
		NUMORDRE as string,
		NUMOPTIM as string,
		{Code Raw Material} as string,
		{Quantity Rate} as float,
		COMP_epu as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: '/* SELECT DISTINCT q1.[COFRML], q1.[COETAB], q1.[NUMORDRE], q1.[NUMOPTIM], q1.[Code Raw Material], q1.[Quantity Rate], q2.COMP_epu  FROM [dbo].ARDM_FORMULA_RAW_MATERIAL q1 INNER JOIN (SELECT CASE WHEN CHARINDEX(\'.\', [Code Raw Material])>0 THEN SUBSTRING([Code Raw Material], 0, CHARINDEX(\'.\',[Code Raw Material]))             WHEN CHARINDEX(\',\', [Code Raw Material])>0 THEN SUBSTRING([Code Raw Material], 0, CHARINDEX(\',\',[Code Raw Material])) 			ELSE [Code Raw Material] END as COMP_epu,  			MAX([Code Raw Material]) as [Code Raw Material] FROM [dbo].[ARDM_FORMULA_RAW_MATERIAL] group by CASE WHEN CHARINDEX(\'.\', [Code Raw Material])>0 THEN SUBSTRING([Code Raw Material], 0, CHARINDEX(\'.\',[Code Raw Material]))             WHEN CHARINDEX(\',\', [Code Raw Material])>0 THEN SUBSTRING([Code Raw Material], 0, CHARINDEX(\',\',[Code Raw Material])) 			ELSE [Code Raw Material] END) q2 on q1.[Code Raw Material]=q2.[Code Raw Material]   ORDER BY q1.[COFRML] */ SELECT DISTINCT q1.[COFRML], q1.[COETAB], q1.[NUMORDRE], q1.[NUMOPTIM], q1.[COMP] as [Code Raw Material], q1.[Quantity Rate], q2.COMP_epu  FROM [dbo].ARDM_FORMULA_RAW_MATERIAL q1 INNER JOIN (SELECT CASE WHEN CHARINDEX(\'.\', [COMP])>0 THEN SUBSTRING([COMP], 0, CHARINDEX(\'.\',[COMP]))             WHEN CHARINDEX(\',\', [COMP])>0 THEN SUBSTRING([COMP], 0, CHARINDEX(\',\',[COMP])) 			ELSE [COMP] END as COMP_epu,  			MAX([COMP]) as [Code Raw Material] FROM [dbo].[ARDM_FORMULA_RAW_MATERIAL] group by CASE WHEN CHARINDEX(\'.\', [COMP])>0 THEN SUBSTRING([COMP], 0, CHARINDEX(\'.\',[COMP]))             WHEN CHARINDEX(\',\', [COMP])>0 THEN SUBSTRING([COMP], 0, CHARINDEX(\',\',[COMP])) 			ELSE [COMP] END) q2 on q1.[COMP]=q2.[Code Raw Material]   ORDER BY q1.[COFRML]',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> SourceOLEDB	source(output(
		UID as integer,
		FormulaCode as string,
		VersionCode as string,
		RevisionCode as string,
		UIDFactory as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT UID       ,FormulaCode       ,VersionCode       ,RevisionCode       ,UIDFactory   FROM dbo.ProcessCardFormulasVersions',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> RechercheLKPTABLE	source(output(
		FormulaVersionUID as integer,
		CodeRawMaterial as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT FormulaVersionUID, CodeRawMaterial FROM ProcessCardFormulasComposition',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> Recherche1LKPTABLE
SourceOLEDB derive(UserName = $User__ProfilSSIS) ~> Colonnedrive
Colonnedrive,RechercheLKPTABLE lookup(NUMOPTIM == RevisionCode && COETAB == UIDFactory && COFRML == FormulaCode && NUMORDRE == VersionCode,
	multiple: false,
	pickup: 'any',
	broadcast: 'none')~> Recherche
Recherche split(isMatch(), disjoint: true) ~> RechercheIsMatch@(Match,NotMatch)
RechercheIsMatch@NotMatch derive(UID = UID) ~> PlaceHolderScriptComponent
PlaceHolderScriptComponent,Recherche1LKPTABLE lookup(UID == FormulaVersionUID && MD5CodeRawMaterial == CodeRawMaterial,
	multiple: false,
	pickup: 'any',
	broadcast: 'none')~> Recherche1
Recherche1 split(isMatch(), disjoint: true) ~> Recherche1IsMatch@(Match,NotMatch)
Recherche1IsMatch@NotMatch derive(QuantityRate_crit = Quantity_Rate) ~> Colonnedrive1
Recherche1IsMatch@NotMatch sink(input(
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn()) ~> CommandeOLEDB1
Colonnedrive1 sink(input(
		{} as float
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		{} = Param_0)) ~> CommandeOLEDB
